summary: Redeployed the existing dedicated Netlify staging-only site after the AG Digitalz Manual Posting Pack v1 target app merge.
notes: Executed only the owner-approved redeploy of the existing dedicated staging-only site ag-social-media-management-system-staging from target repo main SHA eaa05e5fcf9fa64e2ae85ace52f7c0949e00841d. Netlify labels the deploy context as production because it is the primary context of the dedicated staging-only site; this is not an AG Digitalz production domain, customer production domain, or production customer system. No custom domain, DNS change, paid feature, secret, social account connection, credential use, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, n8n activation, real client private data, target repo edit beyond the merged PR, Lead Gen change, AI Receptionist change, Constitution change, accepted lesson, or permanent memory occurred.
